pick_trigger.title: Cycle completion
pick_trigger.description: Choose the sensor that means the wash cycle has finished. You will set person, notifications, and optional door sensor next; timing is the last step.

data_description.trigger_entity: Use a WashData binary sensor for the simplest setup (on→off when the cycle ends), or a state sensor if you need to trigger on a specific value.

trigger_state.title: Completion state
trigger_state.description: This sensor is not a binary sensor — enter the exact state value that means the cycle is done.

data_description.trigger_state: Example: Idle. Case-sensitive — check Developer Tools → States for the exact string.

presence_notify_door.title: Person, notify, door
presence_notify_door.description: Choose who must be home before reminders fire, which notify entity to use, and optionally a door sensor to cancel reminders.

data_description.person_entity_id: Notifications are held until this person arrives home.
data_description.notify_target: Only notify.* entities are listed — typically from the Home Assistant Companion App.
data_description.door_sensor_entity_id: Optional. A contact sensor on the machine door. Opening the door cancels pending reminders and the active reminder loop.

door_options.title: Door sensor polarity
door_options.description: Adjust how an open door is detected for the sensor you selected.

data_description.door_sensor_inverted: Most contact sensors report "on" when the door is open. Turn this on if your sensor works the other way around — reminders would cancel when you close the door instead of when you open it.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: Set how often and how long reminders repeat. All of these can be changed later without reinstalling.

data_description.snooze_minutes: How long to wait after tapping Snooze before sending another reminder.
data_description.repeat_interval_minutes: How long to wait between automatic reminders when a notification is ignored.
data_description.max_repeats: Stop reminding after this many attempts. At the default 30-minute interval, 10 reminders span about 5 hours.
data_description.arrival_delay_seconds: How long to wait after arriving home before sending the notification. Gives your phone time to reconnect to WiFi. Set to 0 to notify immediately.

error.notify_entity_invalid: Select a notify.* entity from the list.
error.notify_entity_not_found: That notify entity is not available. Reload the integration that provides it, or pick another notify entity.
error.notify_service_not_found: The notify service for this entity is missing. Check that the Companion App is set up and the entity is loaded.
error.trigger_state_required: Enter the exact completion state for this sensor (e.g. Idle). Case-sensitive — check Developer Tools → States.

init.title: Timing
init.description: Adjust reminder timing. Changes take effect immediately.

data_description.snooze_minutes: How long to wait after tapping Snooze before sending another reminder.
data_description.repeat_interval_minutes: How long to wait between automatic reminders when a notification is ignored.
data_description.max_repeats: Stop reminding after this many attempts.
data_description.arrival_delay_seconds: How long to wait after arriving home before sending the notification. Set to 0 to notify immediately.

trigger_entity_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Make sure ha_washdata is installed and has finished loading before Wash Reminder starts.

person_entity_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Check your person configuration under Settings → People.

door_sensor_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Verify the entity ID under Developer Tools → States.

notify.title: 🧺 Laundry Done
notify.cycle_complete: Time to empty the washing machine.
